name: Swaarm
description: Performance marketing and mobile measurement platform handling 30+ billion events per day across affiliate and app channels.

seo.title: Swaarm — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Swaarm: Performance marketing and mobile measurement platform handling 30+ billion events per day across affiliate and app channels.

when_to_use: Attribution tracking for app installs across affiliate channels
Handling 30B+ events for performance marketing platforms
Fraud detection across affiliate and paid app install campaigns

pros: Handles billions of events daily without choking
Flexible enough for both affiliate and app channels
Competitive pricing versus AppsFlyer and Adjust
cons: Smaller partner catalog than Tier-1 MMPs
review.verdict: Credible AppsFlyer alternative at high volume for price-sensitive buyers, though ecosystem depth still trails.
review.best_for: High-volume performance networks and app advertisers wanting MMP features at better pricing.
review.not_for: Enterprises that require the largest partner catalog and strictest SLAs from day one.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
